description:
UPDATE: I’m hosting a guided Portugal trip based on this itinerary — click here to join us! 👉https://groups.goaheadtours.com/tours/aly-smalls-yrt2026  👉 Here’s how to spend 2 weeks traveling through Portugal, where I share the full breakdown of our itinerary visiting Porto, Lisbon, the Algarve and some day trips in between (Douro Valley, Sintra, Obidos and more)! Perfect if you’re planning a trip to Portugal for the first time. 

👉 If you're interested in joining a tour, here is a very similar route to the one that we took, with everything planned out for you: https://tidd.ly/49GGh2F

► Portugal Blog Post: https://likewhereyouregoing.com/portugal-travel-blog-12-day-itinerary/

► Daily Drop Pro (flights): https://www.dailydrop.com/pro?via=aly-smalls

► TOURS:
Porto Food Tour: https://viator.tp.st/mg12u2FT 

Douro Valley Day Trip (wine): https://getyourguide.tp.st/STNfAWvy 

Porto to Lisbon Driver: https://viator.tp.st/SMLql0Bu 

Lisbon Tuk Tuk Tour: https://getyourguide.tp.st/iuCPxACi 

Sintra Tour Guide: https://youdeservetours.com/ (tell him Aly Smalls sent you)!

Sintra Private Tour (another option): https://viator.tp.st/K8a8BG8b 

Sintra Small Group Tour: https://getyourguide.tp.st/jZBGDQlO 

Benagil Cave Kayak Tour: https://getyourguide.tp.st/zX93bt6r 

► HOTELS:
Porto Hotel: https://booking.stay22.com/likewhereyouregoing/-oATk6PwrX 

Obidos Castle Hotel: https://booking.stay22.com/likewhereyouregoing/ajLJCfrO3v 

Lisbon Hotel: https://booking.stay22.com/likewhereyouregoing/cUYeFqaBjf 

Algarve Hotel: https://booking.stay22.com/likewhereyouregoing/3jf86GI4Ta 

► Airport Transportation: https://tpo.li/CsbQJC1T 

► LUGGAGE:

Bric’s 21” Spinner (blue): https://go.shopmy.us/p-35804457 

Monos Carry-on (olive green): https://go.shopmy.us/p-22259004 

Cream-colored carry-on: https://amzn.to/3YGtMNM 

► SLING BAGS: 

Nomad Lane sling (large): https://nomad-lane.myshopify.com/products/tomodachi-sling?rfsn=8318354.ddb71b&variant=49434243793201 

Monos Metro Sling: https://go.shopmy.us/p-35860046 

Lululemon Belt Bag: https://go.shopmy.us/p-9562108 

► my necklace: https://go.shopmy.us/p-7737258 

Chapters:
0:00 The Perfect Trip
0:33 Itinerary Overview
1:15 Porto
2:16 Douro Valley
3:30 Porto Hotel + more recs
5:05 Aveiro, Nazare & Obidos
7:18 Lisbon Hotel 
8:07 What we did in Lisbon 
10:33 Overrated...? 
11:27 Sintra
13:05 The Algarve
13:32 Our Hotel in Carvoeiro 
14:10 Algarve Highlights
15:49 Luggage Details
16:29 Stay tuned...

► Buy Me a Coffee?
If you found this helpful and would like to support me, you can 'buy me a coffee' (thank you!!!!)
https://buymeacoffee.com/alysmalls
